About.label: About
About.description: World Emotion Map visualizes the emotional pulse of global news in real time. Each country is colored by the dominant emotion reported in news media — Joy, Fear, Anger, Sadness, Trust, or Optimism — giving you an instant gestalt of how the world feels right now.
About.step1: GDELT GKG processes 100,000+ global news articles per day and extracts emotion signals using natural language processing.
About.step2: We aggregate those signals by country and sector, updated hourly, into our emotion database.
About.step3: The interactive map renders the dominant emotion for each country as a color, updated every hour.
About.dataSourceBody: Emotion data is sourced from the GDELT Global Knowledge Graph (GKG), a real-time open dataset that monitors the world's news media in 65 languages across 195 countries.
About.dataDisclaimer: Note: this data reflects news media sentiment, not the actual emotional state of any population. It should not be used as the basis for financial or political decisions.
About.subscribeBody: Get notified when we launch new features and emotion insights. No spam — we'll email you only for major updates.
About.subscribeSuccess: Thank you! You're on the list.
